mapper.select: SELECT cr.* FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN room_members rm ON rm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND cr.room_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.user_id IN (#{user1}, #{user2}) GROUP BY cr.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rm.user_id) = 2 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm2 WHERE rm2.room_id = cr.room_id ) = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms(room_type, room_name, room_status, created_by) VALUES (#{roomType}, #{roomName} , #{roomStatus} ,#{createdBy})

INSERT INTO room_members(room_id, user_id , role , custom_room_name,custom_room_thumbnail,member_status) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{role} , #{customRoomName},#{customRoomThumbnail},#{memberStatus})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.message_id, m.room_id, u.public_id AS sender_public_id, m.message_text, m.created_at,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm WHERE rm.room_id = m.room_id AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' AND rm.user_id != m.sender_id AND ( rm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR rm.last_read_message_id < m.message_id ) ) AS unread_count
FROM chat_messages m
JOIN users u ON u.user_id = m.sender_id
WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId}
ORDER BY m.message_id DESC LIMIT 20 ) t ORDER BY t.message_id ASC
select last_read_message_id from room_members where room_id = #{roomId} and user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_type AS roomType,
COALESCE( me.custom_room_name, CASE WHEN r.room_type = 'DIRECT' THEN ( SELECT u.nickname FROM room_members other_rm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = other_rm.user_id WHERE other_rm.room_id = r.room_id AND other_rm.user_id != me.user_id AND other_rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1 ) ELSE r.room_name END ) AS customRoomName,
me.custom_room_thumbnail AS customRoomThumbnail,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm_count WHERE rm_count.room_id = r.room_id AND rm_count.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS activeMemberCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT m.message_id) AS unreadCount,
( SELECT cm.message_text FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS lastMessage,
( SELECT cm.created_at FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS lastMessageTime
FROM room_members me
JOIN chat_rooms r ON r.room_id = me.room_id
LEFT JOIN chat_messages m ON m.room_id = r.room_id AND m.message_id > IFNULL(me.last_read_message_id, 0) AND m.sender_id != me.user_id
WHERE me.user_id = #{userId} AND me.member_status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.room_status = 'ACTIVE'
GROUP BY r.room_id, r.room_type, r.room_name, me.custom_room_name, me.custom_room_thumbnail, me.user_id, me.last_read_message_id
ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC, r.room_id DESC
select * from room_members where room_id=#{roomId} and user_id = #{userId} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT u.public_id AS publicId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.friend_code AS friendCode, u.profile_img AS profileImg, rm.role AS role FROM room_members rm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rm.user_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rm.room_member_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE room_members SET member_status = 'LEFT', left_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'
update room_members set role = 'NONE', member_status = 'KICKED', kicked_at = NOW() where room_id=#{roomId} and user_id =#{kickedUserId} and member_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: select role from room_members where room_id=#{roomId} and user_id=#{userId} and member_status = 'ACTIVE'
